subject: We printed this so you’d actually read it
label: Inbox

body.text: This is a cold email. You can tell, because it is sitting on your desk at A2 rather than in the folder where the other ones quietly go to die.
Making it impossible to ignore is the easy part. Earning the next sixty seconds is the part we take seriously, so here is what we actually wanted to say.
We spent some time on Qflow. A few things stood out:
Your first tier-one pour was logged before you had finished arguing about the logo.
One of your audit trails settled a site dispute in four minutes. The industry tends to measure that in weeks.
You have logged more deliveries before 9 a.m. than most platforms manage in a day.
Which brings us to what we actually noticed. There is a gap between what arrives on site and what gets recorded, and at your volumes it is large enough to be worth a short conversation.
I have put the Qflow numbers into a one-page view. Fifteen minutes on Thursday and I will walk you through it. If it is not useful, keep the A2 and I will leave you alone.
